tagline: Trusted Pool Service and Repair in Palm Beach

hero.headline: Your Pool, Personally Cared For by the Owner
hero.subheadline: Andy Brody personally handles or oversees every job. With 150+ five-star reviews and 14 years serving Palm Beach County, you get hands-on expertise and accountability most companies can't match. Just enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to full remodels, Andy and his crew handle it all. Every service backed by 14 years of hands-on experience and a reputation we stake our name on.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Debris removal, chemical balancing, filter maintenance, and full surface care. Your pool stays sparkling and swim-ready every single week — guaranteed.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, automation systems — we diagnose fast and fix right. Authorized dealer for Hayward, Jandy, and Pentair equipment.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Repair
cards.description: Non-invasive leak detection using advanced pipe epoxy methods. No digging, no deck damage — just the fix your pool needs, done right.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Resurfacing, new tile, coping upgrades, and modern design enhancements. Transform your backyard into the outdoor space you've always wanted.

cards.title: Pool Automation & Lighting
cards.description: Smart controls for pumps, heaters, and chemicals plus LED color-changing lights. Manage your entire pool from your phone.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Thorough safety and efficiency inspections covering every system, component, and surface. Catch problems before they become expensive repairs.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Call or Text Andy Directly
steps.description: Reach owner Andy Brody directly — no call centers, no runaround. Describe your pool needs and get an honest, transparent quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Show Up and Deliver
steps.description: Andy personally handles or supervises every service call. Licensed, insured, and equipped with parts from Hayward, Jandy, and Pentair to get the job done right.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and equipment runs smoothly. If anything isn't right, we come back and fix it — no charge, no hassle, no excuses.

about.label: Why Palm Beach Trusts Andy
about.headline: Owner-Operated Means You Get Accountability, Not Excuses
about.description: Since 2012, Andy Brody has built Palm Beach Pool & Spa Service on a simple principle: treat every pool like it's your own. That means personally showing up, using quality parts, charging fair prices, and never cutting corners. With 150+ five-star reviews from homeowners and commercial clients across Palm Beach County, our track record speaks for itself.

features.title: Owner on Every Job
features.description: Andy Brody personally handles or oversees every service call. You always know who's responsible for the work.

features.title: Transparent, Fair Pricing
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no upselling. You get an honest quote upfront and that's what you pay.

features.title: Rapid Response Guaranteed
features.description: Same-day service available for emergencies. Most routine appointments scheduled within days, not weeks.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get an honest quote from Andy directly. No contracts, no hidden fees — just straightforward pricing for expert pool care.

guarantee.headline: Our "Make It Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service, Andy will personally come back and make it right at no additional cost. No fine print, no runaround. We've built our reputation on 150+ five-star reviews by standing behind every job — and we're not about to stop now.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within a few days. For emergencies like equipment failures or green pools, we offer same-day response. Call or text Andy directly and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Does Andy really show up personally?
faqs.answer: Yes. Andy Brody personally handles or directly oversees every single service call. That's our promise and the reason we have 150+ five-star reviews. You'll never deal with a random subcontractor.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you work with?
faqs.answer: We're authorized dealers for Hayward, Jandy, and Pentair — the three top names in pool equipment. We carry parts in stock for fast repairs and can source any specialty component quickly.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: Never. We earn your business on every visit. No contracts, no cancellation fees, no lock-ins. If you're not happy, you're free to go — but our 150+ five-star reviews suggest you'll want to stay.

faqs.question: What areas in Palm Beach County do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Palm Beach Gardens, Jupiter, North Palm Beach, West Palm Beach, Royal Palm Beach, Wellington, Palm Beach Island, Juno Beach, Loxahatchee, and Riviera Beach — the full greater Palm Beach area.

testimonials.name: Jan D.
testimonials.text: He showed up, took complete ownership of the problem and got our pool looking good again in a short amount of time. Couldn't be happier with Andy's work.

testimonials.name: Rhicel P.
testimonials.text: Andy is the best! He is always on time, and communicates very well regarding any pool needs. Professional, reliable, and honest — everything you want in a pool service.

testimonials.name: Roberta C.
testimonials.text: Andrew took great care of my pool today. It hasn't looked this clean in months. You can tell he takes real pride in his work. Highly recommend to anyone in Palm Beach.
